title: Invigorating Japanese Cream Ramen
description: A sour and aerated Japanese dish featuring cream, designed to cure hangovers, with diabetic-friendly ingredients. This recipe is a unique twist on traditional ramen.
instructions: Bring the chicken broth to a boil in a large pot.
Add the ramen noodles and cook for 3 minutes.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the cream, soy sauce, and rice vinegar.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic to the cream mixture and whisk until smooth.
Add the cream mixture to the pot with the noodles and broth.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Stir in the chopped green onions.
Garnish with additional green onions if desired.
Refrigerate leftovers for up to 3 days.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
